title: Bee Removal in Clifton, Staten Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Clifton, Staten Island. Safe, humane bee nest removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 flat-rate service.
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Clifton, Staten Island? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe and effective bee removal services throughout this historic neighborhood. Our licensed technicians specialize in humane bee removal from residential properties, commercial buildings, and multi-family homes across Clifton, ensuring your property is bee-free while protecting these important pollinators.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Clifton and Staten Island for years with expert bee removal that prioritizes safety and environmental responsibility. Our experienced team understands the unique challenges of bee infestations in Clifton's mix of Victorian homes, brick residences, and garden apartments, and we offer transparent pricing from $350-$550 with no hidden fees.
localContext: Clifton's tree-lined streets, proximity to Clove Lakes Park, and abundance of older homes with eaves and attics create ideal nesting spots for bees during warmer months. From the historic neighborhoods near Vanderbilt Avenue to properties along the Clove Lakes corridor, our team provides rapid response bee removal services throughout the entire Clifton community.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Clifton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Clifton range from $350 to $550 depending on the location and size of the hive, accessibility, and complexity of removal. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees after a thorough inspection of your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee nest in Clifton?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Clifton, Staten Island. Our team responds quickly to bee emergencies and can typically complete most residential bee removals within a few hours, ensuring your family's safety and peace of mind.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation over extermination, working with local beekeepers to safely rehome colonies. However, in cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or aggressive Africanized bees, we use targeted removal methods that minimize environmental impact.

faqs.question: What types of properties in Clifton do you service for bee removal?
faqs.answer: We service all property types in Clifton including single-family Victorian homes, brick residences, apartment buildings, condos, commercial properties, and multi-family dwellings. Our team has experience removing bees from attics, wall voids, chimneys, soffits, trees, and other common nesting locations throughout the neighborhood.
